历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 344 → 355 → 339 → 395 → 489, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024 (395th), it moved back 56 places compared to 2023 (339th), and in 2025 (489th), it moved back another 94 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 150 places in the last two years, indicating a significantly accelerated backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 489th. Nanjing University's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi: 42 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 50 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. However, the 2026 plan sharply drops to 33, a reduction of 17 from 2025, a decrease of about 34%, the largest drop in the past six years. This significant reduction will markedly intensify competition, theoretically pushing the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 6th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), firmly among the top universities in the country, with strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving cafeteria and dormitory management controversies (such as the 999 yuan emperor crab incident). Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 17th (high heat), with large short video exposure. In 2022, there was attention due to differences in admission cutoffs for major groups, but no significant gaps were recorded. Overall, the reputation is slightly negative but still highly watched, with limited impact on application psychology. Nanjing University has 26 A- or above disciplines, including A+ disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geology, Geography, Atmospheric Science, Physics, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, and Environmental Science and Engineering. Computer Science and Technology (A+), Software Engineering (A), and Electronic Science and Technology (A) are highly relevant to Physics Category majors, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with sustained social popularity. In 2026, Guangxi's total examinees are approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025 (approximately 380,000). Physics Category examinees are estimated at about 269,000, a slight increase from 2025 (260,000), expanding the competition base. Regarding provincial control lines, Guangxi's Physics Category undergraduate batch was 371 in 2024 and 370 in 2025, basically stable, with no major adjustments. Nanjing University is located in Jiangsu Province (not within the province), accounting for about 2.2% of Guangxi's enrollment (2025), making it an inter-provincial enrollment. Guangxi examinees have a strong preference for top universities in East China, and regional factors positively support application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (reaching 489th in 2025), the significant 34% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (theoretically pushing the ranking forward by about 100 places), the strong appeal of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, a slight increase in examinee numbers, and a slightly negative reputation but still high attention, the reduction effect and the backward trend offset each other. Taking into account that the 2025 ranking of 489 is the highest in the past five years and the reduction is large, but the slightly negative reputation and increased examinees have a slight backward pull on the ranking, after limited correction, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 409th, with a fluctuation range of 359–459.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for Physics Category is approximately 409th, with a range of 359–459. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (359th) are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Kuang Yaming Honors College General Science Class, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology). Candidates with rankings around the middle (approximately 409th) should primarily target Tier 2 majors (Software Engineering, Electronic Information Class, Mathematical and Physical Sciences), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (459th) should mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also striving for Tier 2 majors. Note that although Technical Science Experimental Class and Engineering Experimental Class have lower ranking requirements, they cover strong disciplines and offer high cost-effectiveness.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 78 (2021 liberal arts) → 93 (2022 liberal arts) → 99 (2023 liberal arts) → 93 (2024 history) → 118 (2025 history), showing an overall fluctuating and then backward trend. In 2025 (118th), it moved back 25 places compared to 2024 (93rd), the highest ranking in the past five years, with a baseline of about 118th. Nanjing University's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history in Guangxi: 7 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 13 in 2025, expanding year by year. The 2026 plan significantly increases to 20, an increase of 7 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 54%, the largest increase in the past six years. The substantial expansion will significantly ease competition, pushing the admission ranking further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 6th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), firmly among the top universities in the country, with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates. 4. [Reputation Heat] The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving disputes over cafeteria and dormitory management; Douyin comprehensive heat ranking is 17th (high heat), with high short video exposure; in 2022, there was attention caused by differences in professional group admission lines, but no obvious record of gaps. Overall reputation is somewhat negative but still highly watched, with limited impact on application psychology. Nanjing University has outstanding liberal arts advantages, with A+ disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Business Administration, and A-level disciplines including Law, Philosophy, Chinese History, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, etc., highly matching history category enrollment majors, with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially hot and recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. Guangxi history category candidates: about 128,000 in 2024, about 119,000 in 2025 (down about 7%), estimated about 123,000 in 2026 by proportion, slightly up from 2025 but still below 2024 levels. Provincial control line: Guangxi history undergraduate batch 400 in 2024, 402 in 2025, basically stable, no major adjustments included. Nanjing University is located in Jiangsu Province (not local), with about 2.2% enrollment share in Guangxi (2025), a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangxi candidates have a strong preference for top universities in East China, and regional factors positively support application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend (reaching 118th in 2025), the significant 54% expansion in history category in 2026 (pushing ranking back about 38 places), the strong appeal of the school's top tier and liberal arts advantages, the slight increase in history candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion effect is the dominant force. Therefore, the large expansion rate makes the ranking backward reasonable, and the somewhat negative reputation and candidate rebound have limited impact on ranking; no additional correction is needed after evaluation. Predict the 2026 history category minimum ranking to be about 156th, with a fluctuation range of 106–206.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for history category in 2026 is about 156th, with a range of 106–206. Due to the large expansion rate (54%), the ranking has significantly moved back. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (106th or below) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (English, Social Science Experimental Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 156th) should mainly target Tier 2 (Humanities Experimental Class), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (206th) can consider Humanities Experimental Class as a safety option. Note that although Journalism and Communication is in Tier 2, its social heat is clearly discouraged; candidates should combine personal interests when applying.
